PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Herzfeld and Paul Melbostad for Lori Spencer. Tracy Regli for and with Gary Teilman.

Ms. Regli reported that they have a signed stipulation. The Court raised the procedural issues with Ms. Regli's petition. Mr. Melbostad stated that they are willing to dismiss their petition without prejudice, if Mr. Tileman can be appointed administrator of the estate. The matter was taken under submission. If the petition is not granted, that matter is continued to April 23, 2013.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
